title: 02901_Stealing_part_of_a_production_language_model
positive_examples: Openly discussing vulnerabilities that have practical impact is an important strategy for ensuring safe machine learning.
Mitigating near-term potential harms of this research by working closely with affected products.
negative_examples: Successful attacks on production models could lead to security vulnerabilities.
Malicious actors are likely to discover the same vulnerability whether or not it is reported.
